title: fumaria macrocarpa subsp. cyrenaica
intro: Fumaria macrocarpa subsp. cyrenaica, commonly known as the Cyrenaica fumitory, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the fumitory family (Fumariaceae). It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to act as a diuretic and a mild laxative. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to aid in the treatment of digestive issues, urinary problems, and respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Fumaria macrocarpa subsp. cyrenaica are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are typically taken orally to harness its medicinal properties.
